title: acaena latifrons
intro: Acaena latifrons, also known as the broad-leaved caterpillar's tea or broad-leaved variegated woolly-pod, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as arthritis and skin issues. The health benefits of Acaena latifrons include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and skin problems. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
